options: Reflects from objects to our eyes
questions.correctAnswer: Reflects from objects to our eyes
questions.explanation: We see objects when light reflects from them and enters our eyes.

questions.text: Angle of incidence equals angle of reflection.
questions.explanation: Laws of reflection: Angle of incidence = Angle of reflection. Incident ray, reflected ray, and normal lie in same plane.

questions.correctAnswer: The left-right reversal of image in a plane mirror.
questions.explanation: Lateral inversion is the phenomenon where left appears right and right appears left in mirror images.

questions.text: A ________ mirror always forms a virtual and erect image.
questions.explanation: Plane mirrors always form virtual, erect images of same size as object, at same distance behind mirror.
